title: Acoustical Society of America
body: The Acoustical Society of America (ASA) is an international scientific society founded in 1929 dedicated to generating, disseminating and promoting the knowledge of acoustics and its practical applications. The Society is primarily a voluntary organization of about 7500 members and attracts the interest, commitment, and service of many professionals.
categories: Learned societies of the United States
Official website different in Wikidata and Wikipedia
Professional associations based in the United States
